chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–3936 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For order on CMA No.5070/2024. 2. For order on CMA No.5071/2024 (O I R 10). 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 14.11.2024 Mr. Shakeel Akbar, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Farmanullah, Advocate for OGRA. Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, Advocate for SSGCL a/w Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil and Syed Umair Abbas Advocates. Mr. Muhammad Ahmed, D.A.G. Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed, Deputy Chief Manager Sales Department, SSGC. Ms. Taniya Mehnaz Khan, Manager SSGCL. Mr. Ammar Saleem Butt, Manager Legal Department SSGC. Raja Love Kush, Deputy Manager Legal SSGC..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Without resolving the question as to the maintainability raised by the respondents in this petition, we have been informed by Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, learned counsel for SSGCL, that the petitioners have been provided the gas connections and that has rendered this petition as infructuous. Order accordingly. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
